function.message: I couldn’t complete this safely because the request depends on comparing two projects, but only one canonical project record is identifiable. I found the evening hobby project at `40_projects/2026_04_25_black_library_evenings/README.MD`, while BlueMesa Quotebook does not appear as a canonical project record in `40_projects/` (or elsewhere as a project README). Please clarify which exact BlueMesa Quotebook project folder/file to use.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap and inbox/deletion workflows; request treated as non-canonical until verified. Deletion requires uniquely supported target from canonical files; if not uniquely supported, stop for clarification without mutation.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical project evidence exists for the evening hobby project (`40_projects/2026_04_25_black_library_evenings/README.MD`) but no canonical BlueMesa Quotebook project record was found in project lane searches, so start-date comparison and deletion target selection are underdetermined. Per deletion-and-wiping workflow, this requires clarification rather than guessing.
